raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the look focus on sentence-level writing polish, or on the paragraph's technical argument and claims?","rationale":{"R1.6":"The delegation asks to look at a paragraph, which most directly implies sentence- and paragraph-level feedback rather than section-level restructuring or scholarship review.","RX.1":"The projection should disclose uncertainty because the delegation is underspecified and could support multiple review modes.","RX.2":"Any projected responsibility should avoid assuming the reviewer is being asked to validate stronger technical or empirical claims than stated.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within projection only and not actually edit, critique, or assess the artifact.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid enabling harmful downstream use by not certifying robustness or safety claims from the paragraph alone.","RX.5":"The rationale should remain traceable to the delegation wording and the provided paragraph."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Should the look focus on sentence-level writing polish, or on the paragraph's technical argument and claims?

rationale.R1.6: The delegation asks to look at a paragraph, which most directly implies sentence- and paragraph-level feedback rather than section-level restructuring or scholarship review.
rationale.RX.1: The projection should disclose uncertainty because the delegation is underspecified and could support multiple review modes.
rationale.RX.2: Any projected responsibility should avoid assuming the reviewer is being asked to validate stronger technical or empirical claims than stated.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within projection only and not actually edit, critique, or assess the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid enabling harmful downstream use by not certifying robustness or safety claims from the paragraph alone.
rationale.RX.5: The rationale should remain traceable to the delegation wording and the provided paragraph.
